mapper.select:
SELECT id, se_refrigerator_equip_code, se_refrigerator_name, se_refrigerator_type, se_refrigerator_spec, se_refrigerator_cooling_capacity, se_refrigerator_rated_power, se_refrigerator_evap_temp, se_refrigerator_cond_temp, se_refrigerator_refrigerant, se_refrigerator_oil_type, se_refrigerator_material, se_refrigerator_explosion_proof, se_refrigerator_motor_model, se_refrigerator_cooling_type, se_refrigerator_install_pos, se_refrigerator_in_service, se_refrigerator_inspect_cycle, se_refrigerator_last_inspect, se_refrigerator_next_inspect, se_refrigerator_inspect_result, se_refrigerator_last_maintain, se_refrigerator_next_maintain, se_refrigerator_leak_test, se_refrigerator_coeff, se_refrigerator_maintain_record, se_refrigerator_fault_record, se_refrigerator_operator, se_refrigerator_create_time, se_refrigerator_update_time, se_refrigerator_factory, se_refrigerator_status, se_refrigerator_reserve1, se_refrigerator_reserve2, se_refrigerator_reserve3 FROM se_refrigerator
and se_refrigerator_equip_code like CONCAT( #{queryParams.seRefrigeratorEquipCode}, '%')
and se_refrigerator_name like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seRefrigeratorName}, '%')
and se_refrigerator_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seRefrigeratorStatus}, '%')
and se_refrigerator_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seRefrigeratorFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, se_refrigerator_equip_code, se_refrigerator_name, se_refrigerator_type, se_refrigerator_spec, se_refrigerator_cooling_capacity, se_refrigerator_rated_power, se_refrigerator_evap_temp, se_refrigerator_cond_temp, se_refrigerator_refrigerant, se_refrigerator_oil_type, se_refrigerator_material, se_refrigerator_explosion_proof, se_refrigerator_motor_model, se_refrigerator_cooling_type, se_refrigerator_install_pos, se_refrigerator_in_service, se_refrigerator_inspect_cycle, se_refrigerator_last_inspect, se_refrigerator_next_inspect, se_refrigerator_inspect_result, se_refrigerator_last_maintain, se_refrigerator_next_maintain, se_refrigerator_leak_test, se_refrigerator_coeff, se_refrigerator_maintain_record, se_refrigerator_fault_record, se_refrigerator_operator, se_refrigerator_create_time, se_refrigerator_update_time, se_refrigerator_factory, se_refrigerator_status, se_refrigerator_reserve1, se_refrigerator_reserve2, se_refrigerator_reserve3 FROM se_refrigerator
and se_refrigerator_equip_code like CONCAT( #{seRefrigeratorEquipCode}, '%')
and se_refrigerator_name like CONCAT ('%',#{seRefrigeratorName}, '%')
and se_refrigerator_status like CONCAT ('%',#{seRefrigeratorStatus}, '%')
and se_refrigerator_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{seRefrigeratorFactory}, '%')
